intent: Write a community-consensus report on 'beginner running gear under $150'. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the sports-outdoors and clothing-shoes-jewelry categories and collect at least 4 products relevant to beginner runners (shoes, shorts/top, hydration, one recovery/stretching item). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/science for posts on starting-runner injury prevention, whether expensive shoes help, or common mistakes. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) list each storefront pick with stats and one line of justification, (b) extract at least two consensus points from Reddit (things multiple posts agree on), (c) flag one storefront item the consensus would reject and explain why, (d) conclude with a $150 first-month kit plus one behavioral habit. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Shopping (sports-outdoors + clothing) + Reddit (LifeProTips + science). Consensus-extraction angle is the differentiator.
